events.title: Mission Bay Beach Clean-Up
events.description: Join the crew for a morning of sun, good company and a cleaner coastline. Gloves, bags and coffee provided.

events.title: Community Kitchen Volunteer Night
events.description: Help prepare and serve meals for whānau in need. A warm, hands-on night that makes an immediate impact.

events.title: Campus Tree Planting Day
events.description: Get your hands in the soil and help green our campus. All tools and a free SVA tee for every planter.

events.title: Winter Foodbank Drive
events.description: Sort and pack donations for local foodbanks during the coldest months. Bring a friend and a tin to donate.
